comments: Excellent response time on fiber cut repair. Team was professional and kept us informed.
Resolution was acceptable but took longer than expected for P1 issue.
Multiple outages this quarter. Not meeting our SLA expectations.
Good communication throughout the power outage event. Proactive notifications.
Capacity issues causing performance degradation during peak hours.
Outstanding service. Zero downtime this quarter. Very happy with the team.
Good overall service. Fiber repair was handled well last month.
Documentation of changes affecting our circuits needs improvement. Not enough notice.
Satisfied with core service. Would like faster RCA delivery after incidents.
Unacceptable. Multiple SLA breaches. We are evaluating alternatives.
Excellent proactive monitoring. Issues resolved before we noticed them.
Service is ok but pricing doesn't match the SLA tier we're paying for.
The capacity upgrade went smoothly. Good project management.
Top notch service. Your NOC team is responsive and knowledgeable.
Generally satisfied but the Feb fiber cut took too long to restore.
Good service this quarter. The new 10G circuit installation was smooth.
Too many minor incidents. Each one requires us to file paperwork. Frustrating.
The RCA reports are thorough but too slow. Week-long delay not acceptable.
Great team. They went above and beyond during the March security incident.
Improvement from last quarter. Capacity augmentation helped our peak traffic.
The underground fiber breaks are too frequent. Need better route protection.
Communication during incidents is excellent. Always kept in the loop.
Best telecom provider we've worked with. Consistent performance.
Average service. Nothing outstanding. Would like more proactive maintenance.
Satisfied with the DWDM wavelength service. Stable and reliable.
